name: Cover First, Disagree Softly: Rethinking Mismatch-First Active Learning for Frame-Level Audio Classification
summary: arXiv:2607.13571v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Sound event detection relies on frame-level strong labels whose annotation is expensive. Active learning addresses this problem by selecting the au...
description: arXiv:2607.13571v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Sound event detection relies on frame-level strong labels whose annotation is expensive. Active learning addresses this problem by selecting the audio segments whose labels help the classifier most. One of the prevailing acquisition strategies for this task, mismatch-first farthest-traversal (MFFT), combines the disagreement between two classifi...
author: Shiqi Zhang, Tuomas Virtanen
